ead.archdesc:
======= RMM07036John V. Breedlove papers7036Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
April 20162B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
vnwarThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:01:14 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
John V. Breedlove papers
Breedlove, John V. (John Vincent), 1945-
Vietnam War Veterans Archives
7036
7.4 cubic feet. 7.4 cubic feet.
[ca. 1963]-1986. Correspondence, records, memorabilia, video cassettes, and photographs. Includes letters to family, certificates and medals, maps, Army records, insignia, receipts, and memorabilia of a helicopter pilot in the Vietnam War. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 14 15 ======= 14 15 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2926400
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2016
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, April 2016
Date modified:
RMC Staff, April 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Vietnam War veteran.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes letters to family, certificates and medals, maps, Army records, insignia, receipts, and memorabilia of a helicopter pilot in the Vietnam War. Also, videocassette of movies taken in Vietnam and tape recordings sent home during the war; includes family papers and business records, and photographs.
NOTES
Part of Vietnam War Veterans Archives.
Cite As:
John V. Breedlove Papers, #7036. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Conditions Governing Access
Boxes 6, 8, 9, and 12 restricted for 50 years except by written permission of the donor.
Processing Information
The contents of box 7 were added to box 6. Box 7 no longer exists.
Maps. Vietnamese Conflict, 1961-1975. Veterans. Soldiers.
2926400 <<<<<<< HEAD Link to a partial finding aid.Box 1414
Conditions Governing Access
RestrictedROTC196411Original Army Processing materials1965-196612U.S. Army Finance records1968-197013Financial Records, Discharge papers1966-198114Boot Camp196615Flight School1966-196716Flight School records (U.S. and Vietnam)1966-196717Flight School Graduation196718Helicopter Manuals1966-11-1967-0219Helicopter Manuals1967-11110Helicopter Manuals1969-04111Letters Home1966-05112Letters Home1966-06113Letters Home1966-07-1966-08114Letters Home1966-09-1966-10115Letters Home1966-11-1966-12116Letters Home1967-01-1967-03117Letters Home1967-04-1967-07118Letters Home1967-08-1967-09119Letters Home1967-10-1967-12120Letters Home1968121Letters Home1969-01-1969-03122Letters Home1969-08-1969-11123Letter from a Vietnamese friend1968124Columbus, Georgia orders, promotion, processing material1967-1970125Clothing records, Georgia1969-1970126VA Documentation (x-rays)1973127Resumes (after army discharge)1970128Documentation after the war1969-1982129Awards and Certificates1967-1970130Letters to and from family and friends, photographsDate unknown131Letters to M. and Mrs. E. Borey1966-1967132Bills and ReceiptsDate unknown21Address cards and notesDate unknown22Vietnamese wedding pictures1981-0923Misc. CardsDate unknown24
Scope and Contents
including draft cards, 1969 Vietnamese calendar, stencilMemorabiliaDate unknown25
Scope and Contents
including matches from Seattle (departure location); flight school pen; Dog tags (enlisted man and officer); Chinook going away pin (in box); DAV card, and stickerBusiness cardsDate unknown26National Defense service ribbon and Army Commendation MedalDate unknown27Instrument for arterial plottingDate unknown28Insignia and PinsDate unknown29
Scope and Contents
Including ROTC (Siena College) insignia; Warrant Officer candidate insignia; Warrant Officer WO1 Bar, pin; CW2 Warrant Officer bar (pin and camouflage); US insignias; Vietnamese insignias; Chuan Huy Warrant Officer pin; Air Force Association pin; Chinook pilot pin.Pen light signal flareDate unknown210Folder of Vietnamese language materialsDate unknown31U.S. Army Primary Helicopter School 2nd WOX Class 67-5 Fort Wolters, TexasDate unknown32Citations and CommendationsDate unknown332nd Training Brigade, Fort Polk, Louisiana, U.S. Army Training Center Infantry Company B Third BattalionDate unknown34Medals and PatchesDate unknown4
Scope and Contents
Including: flight school, 3rd Army, and first aviation brigade patches; Unite patches (company level) 119th out of Pleiku; Chinook Unit patches (God is our co-pilot); Name patches, pins (U.S. Army, etc.); Flight School insignia (in orang and black); and army pilot wings. Ring from Fort Wolters, TX; start of flight school ring.Maps, flight school bag, flight school company photograph, and tape.Date unknown5Medical files, correspondenceDate unknown6
Conditions Governing Access
Restricted for 50 years except by written permission of the donor. Identity of individuals mentioned in papers must be restricted for 25 years.Controlled Dissemination handbook and stampDate unknown6
